pdg_node.informal_desc: Applies a differentiator (high-pass) and a subsequent low-pass filter to the raw signal, effectively creating a band-pass filter to isolate QRS frequency content.

declaration.name: apply_qrs_bandpass_filter

pdg_node.informal_desc: Performs the core iterative detection. It scans the filtered signal, dynamically updates high and low thresholds, finds threshold crossings, validates them against timing and morphology criteria, and pinpoints the final peak in the original signal.
